retrospective.notes: Initial S5 reused ContactChat without a feedback-source signal, so AC-MARKER-1/2/3 silently failed — publishFeedbackMessage existed but was never on the send path. Fixed by adding a source='feedback' prop to ContactChat that injects feedbackMarkerTags() into the rumor. Lesson: reusing a chat component for a labelled channel must also route the channel's send semantics, not just its rendering.
